SELECT toDecimal256OrNull(val, 76) AS decimal_value, toTypeName(decimal_value) FROM test_decimal;
SELECT toDecimal256OrNull(toString(1 / 3), 76) AS a, toTypeName(a), toDecimal256OrNull('123456.789123456789', 12) AS b, toTypeName(b) FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT (SELECT toDecimal256OrNull(val, 76) FROM test_decimal WHERE val NOT LIKE '%Inf%') AS filtered_value;
SELECT toDecimal256OrNull(val, 76) AS decimal_value FROM test_decimal WHERE val NOT IN ('NaN', 'Inf') ORDER BY decimal_value DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_nested AS SELECT toDecimal256OrNull(value, 76) AS decimal_value FROM (SELECT '12.34' AS value UNION SELECT '56.78' AS value UNION SELECT '90.12' AS value);

SELECT a.decimal_value, b.decimal_value FROM (SELECT toDecimal256OrNull('1234.5678', 4) AS decimal_value) AS a JOIN (SELECT toDecimal256OrNull('8765.4321', 4) AS decimal_value) AS b ON a.decimal_value < b.decimal_value;
